task.raw_text: Template kernel for domain Tech and role ubi_canon.

law_of_law.description: All decisions must be compatible with planetary limits, nervous-system integrity and AMOS_CORE behaviour.

rule_of_2.description: Hold both an execute_path and a halt_or_restructure_path for each decision.

rule_of_4.description: Map every decision across biological, logical, systemic and planetary axes.
